meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Project Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome a lack of portfolio. An advanced case study for founders leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: To solve the 'no portfolio' trap, deploy the Antigravity project template to rapidly scaffold production-grade SaaS MVPs. By leveraging Claude Code for iterative development, you can generate functional, revenue-ready applications in hours, effectively transforming raw technical execution into a compelling, live portfolio that drives business validation and investor interest.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the 'no portfolio' problem is a silent killer for founders. You have the vision, the drive, and the market insight, but without a concrete artifact to demonstrate your capability, you are just another voice in a crowded room of dreamers. The market doesn't buy ideas; it buys proof of execution.

We bridge this gap using the Antigravity project template—a high-velocity framework designed to move you from zero to deployed in a single development sprint. By pairing this structural rigor with the autonomous execution power of Claude Code, you stop building 'projects' and start architecting scalable, monetizable SaaS assets that serve as your ultimate portfolio.

steps.title: Scaffold the Foundation
steps.description: Initialize your environment using the Antigravity template to ensure industry-standard architecture, including Auth, Database, and Stripe integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a full-stack SaaS boilerplate using the Antigravity template. Include Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS. Ensure role-based access control and a clean directory structure for a SaaS MVP.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your specific SaaS value proposition into the Antigravity data schema to ensure the database layer is ready for high-concurrency usage.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my business requirements: [Insert Requirements]. Update the Prisma schema and database migrations within the Antigravity project to support these specific entities and relations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Update prisma schema to match these requirements: [Insert Requirements]"

steps.title: Automate API Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate type-safe API routes that interact with your database, ensuring your MVP remains performant and bug-free.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure, type-safe API endpoints for CRUD operations on the newly created entities. Implement rate limiting and Zod validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Create API routes for all models with Zod validation and rate limiting"

steps.title: Integrate Monetization Layer
steps.description: Configure the Stripe integration within the Antigravity template to enable real-time revenue collection, moving your project from 'demo' to 'business'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Stripe Webhook handler and Checkout session logic within the project. Map subscription status to the user profile table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Setup Stripe billing integration and connect webhooks to user subscription model"

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Finalize the production build and deploy to a cloud provider to ensure your portfolio piece is live, accessible, and ready for public scrutiny.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Prepare the project for production deployment. Audit the code for security vulnerabilities and optimize bundle sizes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Run security audit and prepare project for Vercel deployment"

pro_tips: Treat your MVP code as a public artifact; write clean, commented code that acts as a technical resume for future investors.
Always implement a 'Feedback Loop' widget in your MVP to capture user data—investors prioritize founders who value data-driven iteration.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to maintain consistent naming conventions across the entire stack, preventing technical debt accumulation.
Don't build custom auth; leverage the Antigravity template's pre-configured Auth providers to focus on your core product differentiation.
Deploy early and often; a live URL in your portfolio is worth ten thousand lines of unreleased code.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on documenting the 'Why' behind your architectural decisions in a public GitHub README to demonstrate senior-level engineering thinking to potential clients or employers.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the tools to build a portfolio that commands authority and secures revenue. Stop waiting for permission to be a founder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

acceptedAnswer.text: Initialize your environment using the Antigravity template to ensure industry-standard architecture, including Auth, Database, and Stripe integration.
Translate your specific SaaS value proposition into the Antigravity data schema to ensure the database layer is ready for high-concurrency usage.
Use Claude Code to generate type-safe API routes that interact with your database, ensuring your MVP remains performant and bug-free.
Configure the Stripe integration within the Antigravity template to enable real-time revenue collection, moving your project from 'demo' to 'business'.
Finalize the production build and deploy to a cloud provider to ensure your portfolio piece is live, accessible, and ready for public scrutiny.
